'''Solipo Yeb''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who wore a costly [[Andalian cloak]]. He was a member of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] circa [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Yeb was one of the many thousands of mourners to attend the [[Padmé Amidala's funeral/Legends|funeral]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].
